prompt: A full-body street fashion photo of a young skater standing on a concrete beachside boardwalk at sunset, with tall palm trees silhouetted in the background and a warm pastel sky fading from peach to pale gold. The subject faces the camera in a relaxed editorial pose, one hand in a pocket and the other holding a worn skateboard vertically by the trucks. He wears a lavender knit beanie over shaggy medium-length dark hair, an oversized cropped faded tan workwear overshirt with two chest flap pockets and a small square logo patch, a plain white T-shirt visible underneath, a black-and-white checkerboard belt, extremely oversized dark indigo baggy jeans with contrast stitching and large utility-style patch pockets, and checkerboard slip-on skate shoes. The jeans should be the hero piece: extra wide leg, pooled and draping heavily over the shoes, exaggerated volume but believable denim structure. Natural candid photography, slightly soft filmic focus, muted tones, subtle grain, realistic lighting, fashion editorial meets skate culture, shot at eye level with a 35mm lens, shallow depth of field, Venice Beach atmosphere, background figures including a few pedestrians and 1 cyclist kept small and out of focus.
